name: EverFocus Electronics Corporation
summary: EverFocus Electronics Corporation engages in the research and development, manufacture, marketing, and service of CCTV surveillance systems, CCD cameras, and digital image processing equipment worldwide. The company offers Edge Computer, a smart surveillance system that provide real-time surveillance footage and access to traffic and road conditions; and multiple interface camera for industrial computers, including USB, RJ-45, etc. It also offers server systems; mobile app and management software that cover transportation, education, surveillance, retail, and medical health care; vehicle surveillance products; and accessories. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
